name: TEST - Total Amount Not Equal to Without Tax + Tax (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.amount_total)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_base)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_tax)
  and round(field.amount_total, 2) != round(
    field.amount_total_base + field.amount_total_tax,
    2
  )
)

payload.content: Total Amount is not equal to Total Without Tax + Tax Amount.
Total Amount is not equal to Total Without Tax + Tax Amount.
